doet.dose_note: NOTE: These doses are tentative and it is recommended to do further research.
doet.name: doet

properties.dose: Oral Threshold: 1mg Light: 2-4mg Common: 4-6mg Strong: 6-10mg | NOTE: These doses are tentative and it is recommended to do further research.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A potent and long acting psychedelic stimulant and substituted amphetamine, similar in effects to other DOx compounds. First synthesised by Alexander Shulgin.
